transcript.text: Living in Lafayette V-LOG the 3rd of June 2013. Yesterday I worked all day

Even though I'm you know I'm probably not totally done with it but I can fix
Things you know piecemeal but I just want to get it all in there now just to
Make sure it's all standardized and it's all ready to go for whenever I decide
To get all the other pages caught up with that. So that's what I'll do today.
Worked all day yesterday and then I returned the movie Hobbit but then I
Came back home because I figured I wouldn't you know watch a movie again and
Then if I return the movie and I don't get another movie that means I don't have to
Go back to the supermarket the next day but then I came when I worked and I
